title: The Cloud Client Experience
description: 1.7.10, 1.8.9 and 1.12.2 Performance and PvP Modpack with the Cloud Client mod as the main focus
body:
**Cloud Client is NOT my mod. This is a modpack containing it. Same goes for all other mods in the pack. Read disclaimers.**

# The Cloud Client Experience

Cloud Client is a free and open-source 1.7.10, 1.8.9 and 1.12.2 PvP Client that comes in the form of a mod.  

**The Cloud Client Experience** is a modpack that was made to create a more "standard" PvP client feel, and make it a more viable alternative for other clients like Lunar Client, Badlion Client, Feather Client, etc.

Suggestions, bugs, contact me on Discord Jux#2213 or use the issue tracker.

Cloud Client's Source Code (main branch, beta): https://github.com/CloudClientDev/cloudclient  
Cloud Client's Source Code (development branch, alpha): https://github.com/CloudClientDev/cloudclient/tree/development

## Disclaimers

- Report any issues to **ME**, not to any of the mod makers.

- In 1.8.9 and 1.12.2, you can record replays with Replay Mod, but as of right now, there's a compatibility issue that prevents replays from being watched. To watch replays, temporarily disable all of Cloud Client's HUD mods. If you don't it'll crash.

- None of the mods here are mine. They're all available at Modrinth and Curseforge except for Cloud Client, go check their pages out.

- Cloud Client is NOT my mod, it is an open-source project anyone can contribute to, and it's maintained by duplicat. It's still in beta. It has a Discord server! More info at the website https://cloudmc.dev/ and the GitHub https://github.com/CloudClientDev/ (Licensed under LGPLv3)

- OptiFine is not included in this modpack because they don't give people persmission to do so. If you want Optifine, you'll have to get it yourself. You can just download the jar and put it in the mods folder. https://optifine.net/

- Please do NOT go into the Cloud Client discord server (linked in their site) to ask for versions, specific features, or included OptiFine, or to ask for support if you're a cracked user.

- I didn't change ANYTHING in the Cloud Client mod or any mods in the pack. I did use the Cloud Client logo and applied a dark faded background to it. (had to be disclosed, in order to comply with LGPLv3)

## FAQ

- Q: Newer versions when?  
A: I, replicat, have no control over what versions it's available for. duplicat, creator, maintainer and developer of Cloud Client is the one in control of what versions the mod supports. Do NOT go and rush the developer, it takes time to port to newer versions because they greatly differ from older ones. You can try to port it to newer versions yourself and start a pull request when you're done, so it gets added.

- Q: Can you add the ____ mod?  
A: DM me on Discord @ Jux#2213 and I'll see if I'll consider it.

- Q: Can I contribute to Cloud Client's development?  
A: Yes! Just make sure **you clone the development branch.** Cloud Client is Free and Open-Source, under the GPLv3 and LGPLv3 licenses. Source Code linked above. Clone the development branch, make the changes you want, and open a pull request!

- Q: Why this modpack?  
A: Because I liked Cloud Client and I feel like the mods in this modpack make the experience feel more complete. Hence the name of the modpack!

- Q: Is this modpack official from the Cloud Client developer?  
A: No(t yet :D).
